title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at EduComp Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at EduComp Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at EduComp Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About EduComp Solutions:
EduComp Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EduComp Solutions!
